title: China’s quiet win in the Iran crisis
summary_full: Beijing has been playing the long game. Right now, it is winning – quietly, carefully, and with a patience that challenges Washington's assumed dominance
summary_public: Beijing has been playing the long game. Right now, it is winning – quietly, carefully, and with a patience that challenges Washington's assumed dominance
